narrative.headline: ⚠ 30 security findings — review before other cleanup. Score 23.3/100 with 78 findings open. Keep the momentum going.

actions.description: 11 orphaned findings — delete dead files or relocate with `desloppify move`
4 structural findings — decompose large files — extract logic into focused modules
9 test_coverage findings — add tests for untested production modules — prioritize by import count
1 responsibility_cohesion findings — split modules with too many responsibilities — extract focused sub-modules
1 boilerplate_duplication findings — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes
9 smells findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
30 security findings — review and fix security findings — prioritize by severity
13 files need design review — run design review with dimension templates
